thi15:1.0.402: p_19Th2_488Nagaramhi kusumanāme,Pāṭaliputtamhi pathaviyā maṇḍe;Sakyakulakulīnāyo,Dve bhikkhuniyo hi guṇavatiyo.
thi15:1.0.403: p_19Th2_489Isidāsī tattha ekā,Dutiyā bodhīti sīlasampannā ca;Jhānajjhāyanaratāyo,Bahussutāyo dhutakilesāyo.
thi15:1.0.404: p_19Th2_490Tā piṇḍāya caritvā,Bhattatthaṁ kariya dhotapattāyo;Rahitamhi sukhanisinnā,Imā girā abbhudīresuṁ.
thi15:1.0.405: p_19Th2_491"Pāsādikāsi ayye,Isidāsi vayopi te aparihīno;Kiṁ disvāna byālikaṁ,Athāsi nekkhammamanuyuttā".
thi15:1.0.406: p_19Th2_492Evamanuyuñjiyamānā sā,Rahite dhammadesanākusalā;Isidāsī vacanamabravi,"Suṇa bodhi yathāmhi pabbajitā".
thi15:1.0.407: p_19Th2_493"Ujjeniyā puravare,Mayhaṁ pitā sīlasaṁvuto seṭṭhi;Tassamhi ekadhītā,Piyā manāpā ca dayitā ca.
thi15:1.0.408: p_19Th2_494Atha me sāketato varakā,Āgacchumuttamakulīnā;Seṭṭhī pahūtaratano,Tassa mamaṁ suṇhamadāsi tāto.
thi15:1.0.409: p_19Th2_495Sassuyā sasurassa ca,Sāyaṁ pātaṁ paṇāmamupagamma;Sirasā karomi pāde,Vandāmi yathāmhi anusiṭṭhā.
thi15:1.0.410: p_19Th2_496Yā mayhaṁ sāmikassa,Bhaginiyo bhātuno parijano vā;Tamekavarakampi disvā,Ubbiggā āsanaṁ demi.
thi15:1.0.411: p_19Th2_497Annena ca pānena ca,Khajjena ca yañca tattha sannihitaṁ;Chādemi upanayāmi ca,Demi ca yaṁ yassa patirūpaṁ.
thi15:1.0.413: p_19Th2_499Kocchaṁ pasādaṁ añjaniñca,Ādāsakañca gaṇhitvā;Parikammakārikā viya,Sayameva patiṁ vibhūsemi.
thi15:1.0.414: p_19Th2_500Sayameva odanaṁ sādhayāmi,Sayameva bhājanaṁ dhovantī;Mātāva ekaputtakaṁ,Tathābhattāraṁ paricarāmi.
thi15:1.0.415: p_19Th2_501Evaṁ maṁ bhattikataṁ,Anurattaṁ kārikaṁ nihatamānaṁ;Uṭṭhāyikaṁanalasaṁ,Sīlavatiṁ dussate bhattā.
thi15:1.0.416: p_19Th2_502So mātarañca pitarañca,Bhaṇati ‘āpucchahaṁ gamissāmi;Isidāsiyā na saha vacchaṁ,Ekāgārehaṁsaha vatthuṁ’.
thi15:1.0.417: p_19Th2_503‘Mā evaṁ putta avaca,Isidāsī paṇḍitā paribyattā;Uṭṭhāyikā analasā,Kiṁ tuyhaṁ na rocate putta’.
thi15:1.0.418: p_19Th2_504‘Na ca me hiṁsati kiñci,Na cahaṁ isidāsiyā saha vacchaṁ;Dessāva me alaṁ me,Apucchāhaṁgamissāmi’.
thi15:1.0.419: p_19Th2_505Tassa vacanaṁ suṇitvā,Sassu sasuro ca maṁ apucchiṁsu;‘Kissatayā aparaddhaṁ,Bhaṇa vissaṭṭhā yathābhūtaṁ’.
thi15:1.0.420: p_19Th2_506‘Napihaṁ aparajjhaṁ kiñci,Napi hiṁsemi na bhaṇāmi dubbacanaṁ;Kiṁ sakkā kātuyye,Yaṁ maṁ viddessate bhattā’.
thi15:1.0.421: p_19Th2_507Te maṁ pitugharaṁ paṭinayiṁsu,Vimanā dukhena adhibhūtā;Puttamanurakkhamānā,‘Jitāmhase rūpiniṁ lakkhiṁ’.
thi15:1.0.422: p_19Th2_508Atha maṁ adāsi tāto,Aḍḍhassa gharamhi dutiyakulikassa;Tato upaḍḍhasuṅkena,Yena maṁ vindatha seṭṭhi.
thi15:1.0.423: p_19Th2_509Tassapi gharamhi māsaṁ,Avasiṁ atha sopi maṁpaṭiccharayi;Dāsīva upaṭṭhahantiṁ,Adūsikaṁ sīlasampannaṁ.
thi15:1.0.424: p_19Th2_510Bhikkhāya ca vicarantaṁ,Damakaṁ dantaṁ me pitā bhaṇati;‘Hohisime jāmātā,Nikkhipapoṭṭhiñcaghaṭikañca’.
thi15:1.0.425: p_19Th2_511Sopi vasitvāpakkhaṁ,Atha tātaṁ bhaṇati ‘dehi me poṭṭhiṁ;Ghaṭikañca mallakañca,Punapi bhikkhaṁ carissāmi’.
thi15:1.0.426: p_19Th2_512Atha naṁ bhaṇatī tāto,Ammā sabbo ca me ñātigaṇavaggo;‘Kiṁ te na kīrati idha,Bhaṇa khippaṁ taṁ te karihi’ti.
thi15:1.0.427: p_19Th2_513Evaṁ bhaṇito bhaṇati,‘Yadi me attā sakkoti alaṁ mayhaṁ;Isidāsiyā na saha vacchaṁ,Ekagharehaṁ saha vatthuṁ’.
thi15:1.0.428: p_19Th2_514Vissajjito gato so,Ahampi ekākinī vicintemi;‘Āpucchitūna gacchaṁ,Marituyevā pabbajissaṁ vā’.
thi15:1.0.429: p_19Th2_515Atha ayyā jinadattā,Āgacchī gocarāya caramānā;Tātakulaṁ vinayadharī,Bahussutā sīlasampannā.
thi15:1.0.430: p_19Th2_516Taṁ disvāna amhākaṁ,Uṭṭhāyāsanaṁtassā paññāpayiṁ;Nisinnāya ca pāde,Vanditvā bhojanamadāsiṁ.
thi15:1.0.431: p_19Th2_517Annena ca pānena ca,Khajjena ca yañca tattha sannihitaṁ;Santappayitvā avacaṁ,‘Ayye icchāmi pabbajituṁ’.
thi15:1.0.432: p_19Th2_518Atha maṁ bhaṇatī tāto,‘Idhevaputtakacarāhi tvaṁ dhammaṁ;Annena ca pānena ca,Tappaya samaṇe dvijātī ca’.
thi15:1.0.433: p_19Th2_519Athahaṁ bhaṇāmi tātaṁ,Rodantī añjaliṁ paṇāmetvā;‘Pāpañhi mayā pakataṁ,Kammaṁ taṁ nijjaressāmi’.
thi15:1.0.434: p_19Th2_520Atha maṁ bhaṇatī tāto,‘Pāpuṇa bodhiñca aggadhammañca;Nibbānañca labhassu,Yaṁ sacchikarī dvipadaseṭṭho’.
thi15:1.0.435: p_19Th2_521Mātāpitū abhivādayitvā,Sabbañca ñātigaṇavaggaṁ;Sattāhaṁ pabbajitā,Tisso vijjā aphassayiṁ.
thi15:1.0.436: p_19Th2_522Jānāmi attano satta,Jātiyo yassayaṁ phalavipāko;Taṁ tava ācikkhissaṁ,Taṁ ekamanā nisāmehi.
thi15:1.0.437: p_19Th2_523Nagaramhierakacche,Suvaṇṇakāro ahaṁ pahūtadhano;Yobbanamadena matto,So paradāraṁ asevihaṁ.
thi15:1.0.438: p_19Th2_524Sohaṁ tato cavitvā,Nirayamhi apaccisaṁ ciraṁ;Pakko tato ca uṭṭhahitvā,Makkaṭiyā kucchimokkamiṁ.
thi15:1.0.439: p_19Th2_525Sattāhajātakaṁ maṁ,Mahākapi yūthapo nillacchesi;Tassetaṁ kammaphalaṁ,Yathāpi gantvāna paradāraṁ.
thi15:1.0.440: p_19Th2_526Sohaṁ tato cavitvā,Kālaṁ karitvā sindhavāraññe;Kāṇāya ca khañjāya ca,Eḷakiyā kucchimokkamiṁ.
thi15:1.0.441: p_19Th2_527Dvādasa vassāni ahaṁ,Nillacchito dārake parivahitvā;Kimināvaṭṭo akallo,Yathāpi gantvāna paradāraṁ.
thi15:1.0.442: p_19Th2_528Sohaṁ tato cavitvā,Govāṇijakassa gāviyā jāto;Vaccho lākhātambo,Nillacchito dvādase māse.
thi15:1.0.444: p_19Th2_530Sohaṁ tato cavitvā,Vīthiyā dāsiyā ghare jāto;Neva mahilā na puriso,Yathāpi gantvāna paradāraṁ.
thi15:1.0.445: p_19Th2_531Tiṁsativassamhi mato,Sākaṭikakulamhi dārikā jātā;Kapaṇamhi appabhoge,Dhanika purisapātabahulamhi.
thi15:1.0.446: p_19Th2_532Taṁ maṁ tato satthavāho,Ussannāya vipulāya vaḍḍhiyā;Okaḍḍhati vilapantiṁ,Acchinditvā kulagharasmā.
thi15:1.0.447: p_19Th2_533Atha soḷasame vasse,Disvā maṁ pattayobbanaṁ kaññaṁ;Orundhatassa putto,Giridāso nāma nāmena.
thi15:1.0.449: p_19Th2_535Tassetaṁ kammaphalaṁ,Yaṁ maṁ apakīritūna gacchanti;Dāsīva upaṭṭhahantiṁ,Tassapi anto kato mayā"ti.
